---
title: "Untitled"
output: html_document
date: "2025-10-10"
---

```{r}
library(readxl)
library(table1)
library(dplyr)
library(tidyr)
library(stringr)
library(glue)
```

### Load data
```{r}
project_path = "/Volumes/rc/lab/E/ECoG/k448_tempo_study"
# get participant metadata
participants_path <- file.path(project_path, "rawdata", "participants.tsv")
participants <- read_tsv(participants_path)
sessions <- read_tsv(file.path(project_path, "rawdata", "sessions.tsv")) %>% filter(exclude == 0)
meta <- left_join(sessions, participants, by = "participant_id")
```

```{r}
# Only show median with IQR
my.render.cont <- function(x) {
  s <- stats.apply.rounding(stats.default(x), digits=2)
  with(s, c("", 
            "Median (IQR)" = sprintf("%s (%s–%s)", MEDIAN, Q1, Q3)))}

participants_no_nans = participants %>% filter(exclude==0)
participants_no_nans$prior_epi_surg <- as.character(participants_no_nans$prior_epi_surg)
participants_no_nans$include_soz_analysis <- as.character(participants_no_nans$include_soz_analysis)
participants_no_nans$asm_home_num <- as.character(participants_no_nans$asm_home_num)
participants_no_nans$rns_after <- as.character(participants_no_nans$rns_after)
participants_no_nans$destructive_surgery_after <- as.character(participants_no_nans$destructive_surgery_after)


table1(~ sex + age_study + 
         age_onset + 
         prior_epi_surg + 
         include_soz_analysis +
         asm_home_num + 
         hyp_post_laterality + 
         hyp_post_location + 
         rns_after + 
         destructive_surgery_after +
         Engel_6_months_simple, data=participants_no_nans, 
       render.continuous=my.render.cont)
```

```{r}
# Load spike detection output
# patient_ids <- meta[meta$include_SOZ_analysis==1, "id_mus"]
patient_ids = c("Mus17", "Mus18", "Mus19", "Mus22", "Mus30", "Mus31", "Mus32")

n = 7

soz_electrodes <- meta[meta$id_mus == patient_ids[n], "seeg_SOZ_contacts"]
soz_electrodes <- strsplit(gsub("\\s+", "", soz_electrodes), ",")[[1]]

id <- gsub("[^0-9]", "", patient_ids[n])

spikes <- read_excel(glue("../Data/sub-{id}/ses-01/eeg/sub-{id}_ses-01_spike_detection.xlsx"))
spikes <- spikes %>%
  mutate(
    channels_names = str_remove_all(channels_names, "\\[|\\]|'"),  # remove brackets and quotes
    channels_names = str_trim(channels_names),                    # remove any extra spaces
    channels_names = strsplit(channels_names, ",\\s*")            # split by comma + optional spaces
  )


counts <- spikes[, c("spike_start", "channels_names")] %>%
  unnest(channels_names) %>%
  count(channels_names, sort = TRUE)

counts = as.data.frame(counts)
counts$SOZ <- ifelse(counts$channels_names %in% soz_electrodes, "yes", "no")
counts$patient <- patient_ids[n]

perc_ch_in_SOZ <- table(counts$SOZ)["yes"]*100 / (table(counts$SOZ)["yes"] + table(counts$SOZ)["no"])
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
library(glue)
library(readxl)

patient_ids <- c("Mus17", "Mus18", "Mus19", "Mus22", "Mus30", "Mus31", "Mus32")

# Iterate over each patient and combine results into one data frame
all_counts <- map_dfr(patient_ids, function(pid) {
  
  # Extract numeric ID for file paths
  id <- gsub("[^0-9]", "", pid)
  
  # Get SOZ electrodes for this patient
  soz_electrodes <- meta %>%
    filter(id_mus == pid) %>%
    pull(seeg_SOZ_contacts) %>%
    gsub("\\s+", "", .) %>%
    strsplit(",") %>%
    unlist()
  
  # Read spikes data
  spikes <- read_excel(glue("../Data/sub-{id}/ses-01/eeg/sub-{id}_ses-01_spike_detection.xlsx"))
  
  # Clean and expand channel names
  spikes <- spikes %>%
    mutate(
      channels_names = str_remove_all(channels_names, "\\[|\\]|'"),
      channels_names = str_trim(channels_names),
      channels_names = strsplit(channels_names, ",\\s*")
    )
  
  # Count spikes per channel
  counts <- spikes %>%
    select(spike_start, channels_names) %>%
    unnest(channels_names) %>%
    count(channels_names, sort = TRUE)
  
  # Label SOZ membership
  counts <- counts %>%
    mutate(
      SOZ = if_else(channels_names %in% soz_electrodes, "yes", "no"),
      patient = pid
    )
  
  # Calculate % electrodes in SOZ (optional summary column)
  perc_ch_in_SOZ <- sum(counts$SOZ == "yes") * 100 / nrow(counts)
  counts$perc_ch_in_SOZ <- perc_ch_in_SOZ
  
  counts
})

```
```{r}
summary_df <- all_counts %>%
  group_by(patient) %>%
  summarise(
    total_electrodes = n_distinct(channels_names),
    electrodes_in_SOZ = sum(SOZ == "yes"),
    perc_in_SOZ = unique(perc_ch_in_SOZ)
  )
```



```{r}
library(ggplot2)


counts_summary <- all_counts %>%
  group_by(SOZ) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_n = mean(n),
    se_n = sd(n) / sqrt(n())
  )

ggplot(all_counts, aes(x = SOZ, y = n, fill = SOZ)) +
  geom_boxplot(alpha = 0.5, outlier.shape = NA) +  # boxplot without outliers
  geom_point(position = position_jitter(width = 0.15), size = 2) +  # show actual points
  geom_errorbar(
    data = counts_summary,
    aes(x = SOZ, ymin = mean_n - se_n, ymax = mean_n + se_n),
    width = 0.2,
    color = "black"
  ) +
  theme_minimal() +
  labs(
    x = "SOZ vs nSOZ contacts",
    y = "Number of spikes",
    fill = "SOZ",
    title = "Number of spikes in SOZ vs nSOZ contacts"
  ) +
  labs(x = "SOZ", y = "n", fill = "SOZ") +
  scale_fill_manual(values = c("yes" = "red", "no" = "blue"))


wilcox.test(n ~ SOZ, data = all_counts)

```


```{r}
ggplot(counts, aes(x = SOZ, y = n, fill = SOZ)) +
  geom_violin(alpha = 0.5, draw_quantiles = c(0.25, 0.5, 0.75)) +
  geom_jitter(width = 0.2, height = 0, alpha = 0.5, size = 2) +
  theme_minimal()

```
